quick_context: conduit-bridge v0.1.0 — standalone OpenAI-compatible proxy for Grok/Claude/Gemini/ChatGPT via Playwright. Built as local companion to conduit-vscode. No tests yet. Next: T-003 (tests) then T-005 (network intercept instead of DOM polling) then T-006 (npm publish).
